2236100.name: The Lonker
2236100.description:
History


Uncover the disappearance of King Arthur, Lonker's father, from Lonker's perspective, a brilliant and talented future prince, but who will have no peace until he finds his father and for that he will have to go on a very bizarre and difficult journey, will it be Will Lonker be able to find his father?

About


The Lonker is a 2D horror game made in pixel art, which tells the story with mysteries you find along the way, it's up to you to theorize some of them, The gameplay mixes psychological terror, platform and puzzles.

Features


  • Pixel Graphics
    • Cutscenes
      • Atmospheric game
        • Gameplay with a chilling soundtrack
